name: relay
description: Schedule prompts into local Claude Code sessions and auto-resume work across session limits.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check src/paths.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/sessions.js && node --check src/executor.js && node --check src/scheduler.js && node --check src/tracker.js && node --check scripts/relay.js && node --check scripts/relay-statusline.js && node --check renderer/app.js
